reviews.comment:
Pésima atención. Espere una larga fila ya que a pesar de tener 10 islas había solo 3 cargando combustible. Cuando me adelanto a una isla, el playero pone el cono viendo que estaba a 1 metro. Quede en el medio, así que decidí irme. Lo que  se espera, ya que representan al ACA, del cual soy socio hace 20 años, que la atención tenga algún diferencial o que al menos los playeros  tengan un mínimo de respeto hacia el cliente.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. I waited in a long line because, despite having 10 pumps, only 3 were open for fuel. When I pulled up to one of the pumps, the attendant put the cone in front of me, even though I was only a meter away. I was stuck in the middle, so I decided to leave. Since they represent the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina), of which I've been a member for 20 years, I would expect some level of service, or at least for the attendants to show a minimum of respect to the customer.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNQak5ubzRBRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
The service time could be improved. Sometimes there are long lines and not enough employees for so many pumps.

reviews.comment:
El acá central es excelente soy socio y lo conozco y frecuento desde hace muchos años. Lástima los playeros te atienden como si fueran municipales

(Translated by Google)
The main resort is excellent; I'm a member and have known and frequented it for many years. It's a shame the attendants treat you like they're city employees.

reviews.comment:
La estación de servicio más mala onda. No te dejan entrar con patines. Tampoco te dejan comprar algo y tomarlo en el auto, vereda ni 5 minutos. Simpáticos. No pasa en ninguna otra estación

(Translated by Google)
The meanest gas station. They won't let you in on skates. They also won't let you buy something and take it in the car, or on the sidewalk, or for 5 minutes. Nice people. It doesn't happen at any other station.
